class Solution:
    def diStringMatch(self, s: str) -> List[int]:
test:
def _same_unordered(actual, expected):
    return sorted(actual) == sorted(expected)

def _valid_di_string(actual, pattern):
    if not isinstance(actual, list) or sorted(actual) != list(range(len(pattern) + 1)):
        return False
    return all(
        (char == "I" and actual[index] < actual[index + 1])
        or (char == "D" and actual[index] > actual[index + 1])
        for index, char in enumerate(pattern)
    )

def _valid_restore(actual, adjacent_pairs):
    if not isinstance(actual, list) or len(actual) != len(adjacent_pairs) + 1:
        return False
    expected = Counter(frozenset(pair) for pair in adjacent_pairs)
    produced = Counter(
        frozenset((actual[index], actual[index + 1]))
        for index in range(len(actual) - 1)
    )
    return produced == expected

def _valid_no_triples(actual, a, b):
    return (
        isinstance(actual, str)
        and len(actual) == a + b
        and actual.count("a") == a
        and actual.count("b") == b
        and "aaa" not in actual
        and "bbb" not in actual
    )

def check(candidate):
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='DDI'), 'DDI')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='DDIDDI'), 'DDIDDI')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='IDDD'), 'IDDD')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='DDDDDDDD'), 'DDDDDDDD')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='I'), 'I')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='IIIIII'), 'IIIIII')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='D'), 'D')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='IIII'), 'IIII')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='IDDDIII'), 'IDDDIII')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='DDII'), 'DDII')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='IDIDIDIDID'), 'IDIDIDIDID')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='IIIIIIII'), 'IIIIIIII')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='DDDDDD'), 'DDDDDD')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='III'), 'III')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='IDID'), 'IDID')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='DDDD'), 'DDDD')
    assert _valid_di_string(candidate(s='DDIDDID'), 'DDIDDID')
